scripts.docker:deps:up: docker compose --env-file docker/.env -f docker/compose.yaml up -d postgres valkey meilisearch
scripts.docker:deps:down: docker compose --env-file docker/.env -f docker/compose.yaml stop postgres valkey meilisearch
scripts.docker:observability:up: docker compose --env-file docker/.env -f docker/compose.yaml --profile observability up -d loki alloy
scripts.docker:observability:down: docker compose --env-file docker/.env -f docker/compose.yaml --profile observability stop loki alloy
scripts.lint: eslint --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern package.json turbo.json eslint.config.js && turbo run lint
scripts.lint:fix: eslint --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern package.json turbo.json eslint.config.js --fix && turbo run lint:fix
scripts.format: prettier --config packages/eslint-config/prettier.config.js --write package.json turbo.json pnpm-workspace.yaml eslint.config.js && turbo run format
scripts.format:check: prettier --config packages/eslint-config/prettier.config.js --check package.json turbo.json pnpm-workspace.yaml eslint.config.js && turbo run format:check
